# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31
Description: Basic infrastructure for our application stack

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDRBlock
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-vpc

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
    Properties: {}

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  NatGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NatGateways'
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      AllocatePublicIp: true
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-route-table

  Route:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    DependsOn: NatGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-security-group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Description: Security group for the application

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnetCIDRBlock
      AvailabilityZone: !Ref AvailabilityZone
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-subnet

  RDS:
    Type: 'AWS::RDS::DBInstance'
    Properties:
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      Engine: aurora-postgresql
      MasterUsername: !Ref RDSMasterUsername
      MasterUserPassword: !Ref RDSPassword
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup

  EC2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0c94855ba95b7f6c1
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: !Ref KeyPairName
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          # Install your application here

  LoadBalancer:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer'
    Properties:
      Type: network
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      InternetFacing: true
